title: AI-Augmented Full Stack Engineer, Aladdin Engineering, Post Trade Accounting - Vice President
company_focus: Investment management and financial technology services
description:
About this role

About BlackRock: Are you interested in building innovative
technology that shapes the financial markets? Do you like
working at the speed of a startup, and tackling some of the
world's most interesting challenges? Do you want to work
with, and learn from, hands-on leaders in technology and
finance?

At BlackRock, we are looking for Software Engineers who like
to innovate and solve sophisticated problems. We recognize
that strength comes from diversity, and will embrace your
outstanding skills, curiosity, and passion while giving you
the opportunity to grow technically and as an individual.

We invest and protect over $11 trillion (USD) in assets and
have an extraordinary responsibility to our clients all over
the world. Our technology empowers millions of investors to
save for retirement, pay for college, buy a home and improve
their financial well-being.

Being a technologist at BlackRock means you get the best of
both worlds: working for one of the most sophisticated
financial companies and being part of a software development
team responsible for next generation technology and
solutions.

Team Overview: The Aladdin Engineering Post Trade &
Accounting Team provides technology solutions for
BlackRock's post trade investment life cycle operational
processes including Accounting & Reporting platform to
support the scale at which BlackRock operates. The team is
responsible for a suite of applications including highly
complex and scalable performance calculation engines,
investment accounting, client reporting systems, platform
for reconciliation, and derivative management. We innovate
incrementally and focus on high level of client service
through responsiveness, accuracy, and efficiency.

Responsibilities: AI-Accelerated Design & Development:
Design, develop, deliver, and maintain web applications
across frontend and backend, leveraging AI-powered
development tools (e.g., code generation, intelligent code
completion, automated refactoring) to dramatically
accelerate solutioning and product build cycles while
maintaining consistent, high-quality output. Agentic
Workflow Engineering: Architect, build, and operationalize
agentic AI workflows—including multi-agent orchestration,
tool-use patterns, and autonomous task execution
pipelines—to automate complex business processes and augment
engineering productivity. Technical Leadership with AI
Fluency: Demonstrate technical leadership of software design
& architecture, incorporating AI-assisted development
practices into the strategic product roadmap and
establishing team-wide standards for responsible AI tool
adoption. Delivery & Planning: Deliver plans and define
milestones, prioritize initiatives, and properly allocate
resources—using AI tooling to improve estimation accuracy
and accelerate delivery against business commitments. Cross-
Functional Collaboration: Collaborate with cross-functional
teams in a multi-office, multi-country environment to
define, design, and ship high-quality software solutions.
Champion AI-augmented development practices across teams.
Frontend & Backend Integration: Implement responsive user
interface applications using Angular and ensure seamless
integration with backend services through an API-first
approach, using AI-assisted coding tools to maintain
velocity and code quality. Complex Problem Solving: Design
and develop innovative solutions to complex problems, using
AI reasoning tools and agentic patterns to identify issues,
explore solution spaces faster, and eliminate roadblocks.
SDLC Participation: Work with project managers, technical
leads, and business analysts to contribute throughout the
SDLC cycle, integrating AI-assisted testing, code review,
and documentation generation into standard workflows.
Stakeholder Management: Manage stakeholders for driving
business decisions, negotiating priorities, and partner with
various business teams to drive strategy and technology
adoption—including communicating the value and limitations
of AI-augmented development. Quality & Resilience: Ensure
scale, resilience, and stability through risk identification
and mitigation, AI-assisted code reviews, creation of robust
test suites (including AI-generated test cases), and
providing level two support. Continuous Improvement &
Innovation: Foster continuous improvement in software
development practices through AI-driven innovation and
automation. Evaluate and integrate emerging AI development
tools, LLM-based agents, and intelligent automation
frameworks into team workflows. Staying Current: Stay up to
date with rapidly evolving AI/ML tooling, agentic frameworks
(e.g., LangChain, LangGraph, Google ADK, AutoGen, CrewAI),
and industry trends to continuously improve development
processes and maintain a competitive edge.

Skills & Experience: Core Programming: Hands-on programming
experience in Java, Python, JavaScript, and TypeScript with
strong OO skills and design patterns. AI-Assisted
Development: Demonstrated experience using AI-powered
development tools (e.g., GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Windsurf,
ChatGPT, Claude) to accelerate coding, debugging, testing,
and documentation—with a track record of maintaining high
code quality at increased velocity. Agentic AI & Workflow
Automation: Practical experience building agentic workflows
using frameworks such as LangChain, LangGraph, Google ADK,
AutoGen, or CrewAI—including multi-agent orchestration, tool
integration, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), and
autonomous task execution. LLM Integration: Experience
integrating large language models into applications via APIs
(OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Vertex AI) and
understanding of prompt engineering, function calling, and
context management. Frontend Frameworks: Experience with
Angular, TypeScript, and responsive web design (Webpack,
HTML5, CSS3). Backend & Open Source Stacks: Experience with
Spring, Tomcat, Maven, JUnit, NodeJS, and Express.
Databases: Experience working with relational (Sybase) and
NoSQL databases. Architecture & Problem Solving: Strong
problem-solving, analytical, and software architecture
skills—with the ability to evaluate where AI tooling adds
genuine value vs. where traditional approaches are more
appropriate. Collaboration: Experience partnering with other
teams, sponsors, and user groups who are on the same product
journey, including evangelizing AI-augmented practices.
Agile Practices: Ability to work in Agile/Scrum development
environments with strong teamwork, communication, and time
management skills. Innovation Mindset: Thought leader around
AI-driven development, new/cutting-edge technologies, and
their practical application in enterprise software.
Distributed Systems Engineering:

- Strong experience designing and operating distributed
  systems, including:
- Service‑oriented and microservices architectures
- Event‑driven and asynchronous processing
- Failure handling, retries, idempotency, and resilience
- Performance tuning and scalability under load

Qualifications:

- B.S. / M.S. degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or
  related subject area
- 7+ years of hands-on development experience
- 1+ years of demonstrable experience using AI-assisted
  development tools in production workflows
- Experience building or contributing to at least one agentic
  AI system or multi-agent workflow

Nice to Have:

- Experience with cloud native tools and cloud platforms
  (Azure, AWS, or GCP)
- Exposure to high-scale distributed technologies
- Experience with DevOps, CI/CD pipelines, and tools like
  Azure DevOps—including AI-augmented CI/CD practices
- Experience with MCP (Model Context Protocol), A2A (Agent-to-
  Agent) protocols, or similar agent communication standards
- Experience or real interest in finance, investment
  processes, and/or an ability to translate business
  problems into technical and AI-powered solutions
- Familiarity with AI safety, responsible AI practices, and
  governance frameworks for AI tool usage in enterprise
  environments

For New York, NY Only the salary range for this position is
USD$162,000.00 - USD$215,000.00 . Additionally, employees
are eligible for an annual discretionary bonus, and benefits
including healthcare, leave benefits, and retirement
benefits. BlackRock operates a pay-for-performance
compensation philosophy and your total compensation may vary
based on role, location, and firm, department and individual
performance.

Our benefits To help you stay energized, engaged and
inspired, we offer a wide range of benefits including a
strong retirement plan, tuition reimbursement, comprehensive
healthcare, support for working parents and Flexible Time
Off (FTO) so you can relax, recharge and be there for the
people you care about.

Our hybrid work model

BlackRock’s hybrid work model is designed to enable a
culture of collaboration and apprenticeship that enriches
the experience of our employees, while supporting
flexibility for all. Employees are currently required to
work at least 4 days in the office per week, with the
flexibility to work from home 1 day a week. Some business
groups may require more time in the office due to their
roles and responsibilities. We remain focused on increasing
the impactful moments that arise when we work together in
person – aligned with our commitment to performance and
innovation. As a new joiner, you can count on this hybrid
model to accelerate your learning and onboarding experience
here at BlackRock.

About BlackRock

At BlackRock, we are all connected by one mission: to help
more and more people experience financial well-being.  Our
clients, and the people they serve, are saving for
retirement, paying for their children’s educations, buying
homes and starting businesses. Their investments also help
to strengthen the global economy: support businesses small
and large; finance infrastructure projects that connect and
power cities; and facilitate innovations that drive
progress.

This mission would not be possible without our smartest
investment – the one we make in our employees. It’s why
we’re dedicated to creating an environment where our
colleagues feel welcomed, valued and supported with
networks, benefits and development opportunities to help
them thrive.

For additional information on BlackRock, please visit
@blackrock | Twitter: @blackrock | LinkedIn:
www.linkedin.com/company/blackrock

BlackRock is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace. We
are committed to equal employment opportunity to all
applicants and existing employees, and we evaluate qualified
applicants without regard to race, creed, color, national
origin, sex (including pregnancy and gender
identity/expression), sexual orientation, age, ancestry,
physical or mental disability, marital status, political
affiliation, religion, citizenship status, genetic
information, veteran status, or any other basis protected
under applicable federal, state, or local law. View the
EEOC’s Know Your Rights poster and its supplement and the
pay transparency statement.



BlackRock is committed to full inclusion of all qualified
individuals and to providing reasonable accommodations or
job modifications for individuals with disabilities. If
reasonable accommodation/adjustments are needed throughout
the employment process, please email
Disability.Assistance@blackrock.com. All requests are
treated in line with our privacy policy.

BlackRock will consider for employment qualified applicants
with arrest or conviction records in a manner consistent
with the requirements of the law, including any applicable
fair chance law.
responsibilities: Design, develop, and maintain web applications across frontend and backend using AI-powered development tools for accelerated delivery
Architect, build, and operationalize agentic AI workflows including multi-agent orchestration and autonomous task execution pipelines
Provide technical leadership incorporating AI-assisted development practices into product roadmap and team standards
Implement responsive UI applications using Angular with API-first backend integration
Collaborate with cross-functional teams across multiple offices and countries to deliver high-quality software solutions
Integrate AI-assisted testing, code review, and documentation generation into standard SDLC workflows
Manage stakeholders to drive business decisions and communicate value of AI-augmented development
Ensure scale, resilience, and stability through risk identification, AI-assisted code reviews, and robust test suites
use_cases: Automating complex post-trade investment lifecycle operational processes
Investment accounting and reporting platform automation
Performance calculation engines for investment portfolios
Client reporting systems and reconciliation platforms
Engineering productivity augmentation through AI-assisted development workflows
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role requires hands-on work building and deploying
agentic AI systems, including multi-agent orchestration
using frameworks like LangChain, LangGraph, AutoGen, and
CrewAI. The position involves architecting autonomous task
execution pipelines and integrating LLMs into production
applications, which is direct work ON AI systems rather than
supporting infrastructure.
